patch.value: GH-244: empty search provider adapter strings should auto-normalize
Tracks GitHub issue #244: empty search.provider/vector_store.adapter strings should not persist as misleading not-configured values after runtime auto-detection.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Triage (during pm-ldr1/GH-157 work): GH-244 is CLOSED on GitHub — resolved in #254 (commit 0447c6e4) by surfacing provider_source/vector_store_source + persisted *_configured values in pm health, so auto-detected providers are no longer misreported as 'not configured'. The narrower 'persist the resolved provider/adapter strings back into settings.json' idea is DECLINED: writing settings.json on every read risks the governance persist-trap (cf pm-haak file-backed-schema leak) and churns the file under VCS. Recommend closing as resolved-by-#254 in a NON-release-bearing touch (closing here would mis-bucket the changelog since the fix already shipped). Related: [[pm-ldr1]] search ergonomics.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Verified GH-244 is already fully implemented and the GitHub issue is CLOSED. resolveProviderConfigSource() (src/core/search/providers.ts:61) classifies configured|auto-detected|unconfigured, and pm health surfaces provider_configured/provider_source + vector_store_configured/vector_store_source in the vectorization check (src/cli/commands/health.ts:1518-1533), so a config audit can tell an auto-detected empty provider/adapter apart from a genuine misconfiguration. No code change required.

patch.value: Verified the runtime provider/adapter source classifier and pm health surfacing already satisfy GH-244; closing the stale tracking item.

Already shipped: GH-244 implemented via resolveProviderConfigSource + pm health provider_source/vector_store_source surfacing; GitHub issue #244 is CLOSED. Verified in this session, no further code change needed.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Re-opened: CodeRabbit (PR #349) correctly flagged that closing this verified-already-shipped tracker inside a release-bearing PR mis-buckets pm-changelog (the GH-244 fix shipped in v2026.6.19 / #254, so listing it under a later release is misleading). Keep OPEN; close in a dedicated NON-release-bearing touch, per the existing triage note and prior practice (cf pm-sdbo/pm-28cf history).

patch.value: Search config normalization (GH-244 follow-up): empty provider adapter strings should auto-normalize
Empty search provider and vector-store adapter strings normalize to unset on read and write; pm health shows the auto-detected source; no misleading not-configured values persist.

## Context
Tracks GitHub issue #244 follow-up. After runtime auto-detection, empty-string search.provider / vector_store.adapter values persist in settings and read as misleading "configured but blank" state instead of not-configured.

## Approach
Normalize on read AND write: treat ""/whitespace as absent in the settings loader (settings validator STRIPS unknown keys already — extend to normalize empties), and stop persisting empty strings from the auto-detect path. Surface the normalized value in pm config get and doctor so agents see 'auto' / unset, not "".

## Definition of done
Setting provider/adapter to "" then reading returns not-configured; auto-detect no longer writes empty strings; GH-244 closed with a comment linking the shipped release; spec covers load-normalize and write paths.
